Fix NERSC compilation: replace tuple parameters with scalar args

Stan tuple types (tuple(real,real), is_tuple_of_size, tuple_element_t)
are not available in the Stan math version on NERSC. Replace tuple
parameters in binormal_cdf, binormal_strip_cdf, and integrand with
separate scalar arguments, updating all call sites to use the
required _cdf pipe syntax (x | params).

commit.message:
Add phase name normalization to handle Analyse/Analysis mismatch

The Gemini prompts create Google Sheets with "Check: Analyse" (British)
but CONFIG.PHASES uses "Check: Analysis". Since getPhases() does exact
matching, the Check phase fell through as a custom phase after Act.

Added PHASE_ALIASES map and normalizePhaseNames() called on every data
load path, so existing sheets with "Analyse" get normalized to match
CONFIG. Also updated source files (parse_markdown.py, gemini prompts)
to use "Analysis" for new projects.

Fix pre-selection artifact: revert to AnimatePresence mode=wait

mode=popLayout caused the exiting step to become an absolutely-positioned
overlay on top of the entering step, making options in the new step appear
visually pre-selected. mode=wait keeps the exiting element in layout flow
during its exit so the layout animation still works cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Phase 15 ClinVar integration — reference DB, auto-annotation, browser UI

Downloads and indexes NCBI ClinVar VCF (GRCh38) into a local clinvar_variants
table. Supports full sync (4.4 M variants) or P/LP-only subset (69 KB, seconds).

Backend:
- ClinVarSyncService: streams gzip decompression, batch upserts with in-batch
  deduplication (full ClinVar has multiple submitters per coordinate)
- ClinVarAnnotationService: cross-references upload variants against local cache
  by exact coordinates, fills clinvar_significance/disease/review_status
- genomics:sync-clinvar Artisan command (--papu-only flag for quick P/LP seed)
- 4 new API routes: clinvar/status, clinvar/search, clinvar/sync, annotate-clinvar
- clinvar_variants + clinvar_sync_log tables; adds clinvar_disease/review_status
  columns to genomic_variants

Frontend:
- GenomicsPage tabbed into Uploads + ClinVar Reference panels
- ClinVar panel: sync status card, P/LP Only / Full Sync buttons, searchable
  table with gene/significance/pathogenic-only filters, significance color badges
- Annotate button (✨) per upload row to trigger ClinVar cross-referencing

commit.message:
remove transpiration reduction, raise waterStorage maintenance 0.015→0.04

Transpiration reduction was universally beneficial (tanks fill on any terrain),
making waterStorage drift neutral everywhere. Removing it and raising maintenance
creates proper selection: waterStorage selected against on wet terrains (~0.20-0.24)
while dry spells still drive it upward on arid (~0.39-0.49).

Flights search widget, hiding the airport inputs. Now:
- Check isVisible() on any [role="dialog"] first
- Only press Escape + wait for hidden if a dialog is present
- Add waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 12s }) before the click
  so slow page loads don't immediately time out

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(quotation): resolve IndexedDB database name mismatch and missing schema

CRITICAL FIX: Quotation creation was failing with "One of the specified
object stores was not found" error due to two issues:

1. Database Name Inconsistency:
   - initIndexedDB() opened "QuotationSyncDB_V2"
   - openDB() opened "QuotationsV2" (DB_NAME constant)
   - Result: Object stores never found in createQuotation()

2. Missing Schema in openDB():
   - No onupgradeneeded handler in openDB() helper
   - First-time users had empty database without stores
   - Result: Transaction failures on all CRUD operations

Changes:
- Line 232: Use DB_NAME constant instead of hardcoded string
- Lines 994-1009: Add onupgradeneeded handler to openDB() to ensure
  schema consistency across all database access points

Impact: Fixes start-quotation flow, enables offline-first quotations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct and enrich 229 ISIN codes in equities database (#126)

Cross-referenced ISIN codes from multiple authoritative sources (ESMA regulatory data,
Borsa Italiana listings, top-rated Kaggle double-checked datasets) to fix incorrect and fill missing ISINs.

Changes:
- 82 ISIN corrections (replaced incorrect/obsolete codes)
- 147 ISIN additions (filled previously empty fields)
- Focused on MIL (Milan) exchange equities verified against Borsa Italiana official data
- Fixed 6 suspicious ISINs with country-code mismatches (e.g. non-IT ISINs for Italian companies)

PS
The situation with equities DB is rather complex. I have reason to suspect that many ISINs
are incorrect because they were extracted using overly simplistic or imprecise regex patterns
and/or because they were not properly joined/parsed using the "Symbol".

However, this is everything I was able to do using authoritative sources related to Borsa Italiana.

I believe the entire equities.csv database needs to be reviewed and thoroughly restructured.

Co-authored-by: carlo <carlo.ruggiero@pm.me>

commit.message:
Add SPECIFYING status; reorder lifecycle; update planning board

- Add SPECIFYING status (sub-stages: Detailed Requirements → In Review → Signed Off → Detailed Estimation)
- Reorder status lifecycle: Backlog → Draft → Scoping → Specifying → Approved → Scheduling → Started → Shipped
- Update Product Planning Board: add Product column, add SPECIFYING column, rename spec entries to distinguishing names with links
- Rename Foundation section → Product Context
- Move AI Context to bottom of PRODUCT_MAP.md; move Research below Active Specs

commit.message:
Make exit sign tappable — clicking it directly exits the scene

Previously the exit sign was visual-only; players had to find the
narrow hotspot strip (x=0..18-20) separately. Now tapping anywhere
on the exit sign (x=0..82, y≈sign area) triggers the scene exit
directly via handleVerb('go'), bypassing the need to find an
invisible bounding box.

Sign only activates when the scene's key item has been collected,
so all existing exit-warning guards remain in place.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Speed up CRM and call log API endpoints

- Call logs list: remove broken .populate() on Mixed-type agentId, add
  .select() to return only fields needed for list view, add .lean(),
  parallelize find+count queries
- Leads list: limit .populate('callId') to essential fields, add .lean(),
  parallelize find+count queries
- Contact history: run CallLog and AgentSMS queries in parallel instead
  of sequential, add .select() to both
- Contacts list: exclude conversationHistory, consentHistory, metadata
  from list response (heavy arrays not needed in list view)
- Add compound indexes on CallLog (userId+phoneNumber, userId+callerPhone)
  and AgentSMS (userId+from, userId+to) for phone-based contact history
  lookups

commit.message:
Process all missed recurring periods in one call

Previously only advanced one period per page load, so catching up from
Feb to Mar required two visits. Now loops through all missed periods
and creates transactions for each before advancing to the next future date.

commit.message:
Fix: resume scores now consistent + highlights always shown

- Sub-scores (impact/style/skills) were showing 95 while overall was 71
  because scoreScaleFactor = 1 when both AI analyses returned the same
  overall score. Now normalizes sub-scores proportionally when their
  average exceeds the overall by more than 5 points.
- Word analysis highlights section now renders whenever wordAnalysisData
  exists, regardless of the showWordAnalysis flag (was blocking display
  when word analysis loaded without the explicit trigger).

fix(esp32): change relay pin from GPIO26 to GPIO43 (TXD)

The relay is wired to GPIO43 (ESP32 TXD pin), not GPIO26.
Updated the pin definition to match the actual hardware wiring.

- RELAY_PIN: 26 → 43
